channel.title: Events on Andrea Dainese
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Andrea Dainese

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... BGP security
item.description: A follower asked me to go deep into BGP security from an attacker perspective. I’m not a BGP expert, so I invited Mario Rosi . Together we are discussing eBGP best practices and RPKI.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... BGP security
item.description: Together with Rocco Sicilia and Mario Rosi we are discussing eBGP best practices and RPKI.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... BGP security
item.description: Together with Mario Rosi we are discussing how to implement RPKI in a simulated realistic environment.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... Cyber Range
item.description: Together with Rocco Sicilia we are discussing a simple Cyber Range scenario while we are talking about how to create it on AWS with Terraform and Ansible.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... Cyber Range
item.description: Together with Rocco Sicilia we are discussing a simple Cyber Range scenario while we are talking about how to create it on AWS with Terraform and Ansible.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... DDOS
item.description: Stefano Giraldo is discussing DDOS and AntiDDOS technologies to protect ISP and customers.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... Linux
item.description: Many followers are reporting to me that they need to increase theirs Linux skills. I decided to dedicate my next live sessions to improve yours Linux skills. On Aug. 17th we are discussing (not solving) a couple of TryHackMe rooms.

item.title: Blue Vs Red: let's talk about... network security
item.description: Starting from a blank diagram, we are designing an enterprise network, and discussing any related topic we need to. You are welcome to ask questions, propose different points of view, and any specific insights.
